name: ~ How to Train Your Dragon RPG ~
description:
Meh. Httyd RPG lol hehehehe.

Anyways, yeah, I saw an HTTYD RPG on here that covered only first movie and had characters only from said movie. Man, was I stoked but a bit disappointed. So now I wanna make an RPG featuring all(not all, some more of the well known dragons) in it, and giving it the option to make its own characters. Enjoy, I guess.

Btw, if you want any dragons added that aren’t already added, please do go ahead and suggest them! Added dragons can be found in personality.
creator: Quoltadoox
